visual_summary: A small, interactive button that changes its appearance on hover. Used when the developer needs a small button that responds to hover events.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready button component with the following characteristics:

Name: Interactive Hover Button Demo
Description: A small, interactive button that changes its appearance on hover. Used when the developer needs a small button that responds to hover events.
Style: flat, borderless, small
Interactions: responsive, hover, clickable
Tags: button, hover, interactivelayer, demo

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
import { InteractiveHoverButton } from "@/registry/magicui/interactive-hover-button"

export default function InteractiveHoverButtonDemo() {
  return <InteractiveHoverButton>Hover Me</InteractiveHoverButton>
}
